paper_metadata.title: AlexaTM 20B: Few-Shot Learning Using a Large-Scale Multilingual Seq2Seq Model
paper_metadata.abstract: In this work, we demonstrate that multilingual large-scale sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) models, pre-trained on a mixture of denoising and Causal Language Modeling (CLM) tasks, are more efficient few-shot learners than decoder-only models on various tasks. In particular, we train a 20 billion parameter multilingual seq2seq model called Alexa Teacher Model (AlexaTM 20B) and show that it achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on 1-shot summarization tasks, outperforming a much larger 540B PaLM decoder model. AlexaTM 20B also achieves SOTA in 1-shot machine translation, especially for low-resource languages, across almost all language pairs supported by the model (Arabic, English, French, German, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Marathi, Portuguese, Spanish, Tamil, and Telugu) on Flores-101 dataset. We also show in zero-shot setting, AlexaTM 20B outperforms GPT3 (175B) on SuperGLUE and SQuADv2 datasets and provides SOTA performance on multilingual tasks such as XNLI, XCOPA, Paws-X, and XWinograd. Overall, our results present a compelling case for seq2seq models as a powerful alternative to decoder-only models for Large-scale Language Model (LLM) training.

extraction_data.innovation: Large-scale multilingual seq2seq model pre-trained on a mix of denoising and CLM tasks, enabling few-shot learning and outperforming larger decoder-only models on long-context tasks like summarization and low-resource language translation.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Multilingual text corpus (not specified in paper, inferred from related work)
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised discriminative fine-tuning (e.g., summarization, NLG tasks)
extraction_data.extension: The model's seq2seq architecture with bidirectional attention enables better long-context understanding, outperforming decoder-only models on summarization and low-resource language translation tasks.
extraction_data.research_problem: Few-shot learning in large language models, multilingual seq2seq models, and efficient training of low-resource language translation models.
extraction_data.application: Few-shot learning, summarization, machine translation, multilingual tasks (XNLI, XCOPA, Paws-X, XWinograd), and low-resource language translation.
